metadata.description: Modern SEO / AEO / GEO skill for AI-agent visibility — audit & optimize sites so ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Bing and classic search can fetch, parse, trust, and cite them.

plugins.name: seo-for-ai
plugins.description: Audit and optimize websites for AI agent visibility (AEO/GEO) alongside classic SEO. Covers static-first render path, semantic HTML, JSON-LD templates, robots.txt / bot policy matrix, Cloudflare AI-bot gotcha, 2 MB byte cap, FAQ extractability patterns, Bing Webmaster Tools, IndexNow, llms.txt, NLWeb, MCP, and the agent-payments roadmap (x402 / ACP / AP2 / UCP).
